title: oreocharis wanshanensis
intro: Oreocharis wanshanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to China and is also known as Wanshan Oreocharis or Wanshan Slipper Orchid. Research has shown that Oreocharis wanshanensis has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its potential medicinal uses. The plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which may help to alleviate digestive issues and promote overall health, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
